questions: "During your time at **CyanGate LLC**, you led the **Atlassian Jira Intelligence System** project, which involved collaborating with cross-functional teams (e.g., Power Platform developers, PostgreSQL admins, and client stakeholders) to replace manual ticket searches with an AI-driven solution. **Tell me about a specific moment when tensions arose between technical teams and business stakeholders over priorities or feasibility.**

How did you navigate the conflict while ensuring the project stayed on track?** *Follow-up:* Did you have to compromise on any technical or business requirements, and how did you communicate that decision to the affected parties?",

{"questions": [
